issues.message: Exercise "project-step-1-task-class" is invalid as fixed_tests code_input because it has fewer than 2 meaningful validations. Replace it with a non-code exercise, regenerate it as stdin-based code_input, or provide distinct file-fixture tests.

Exercise "project-step-2-task-methods" is invalid as fixed_tests code_input because it has fewer than 2 meaningful validations. Replace it with a non-code exercise, regenerate it as stdin-based code_input, or provide distinct file-fixture tests.
